title: Spiced Shrimp Samosas
description: A fusion of Indian flavors with the freshness of shrimp, all wrapped up in crispy samosas.

ingredients.name: Mildly spiced Indian samosa pastry
ingredients.notes: available at most Indian grocery stores

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the ginger paste and garlic paste and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked.
In a bowl, mix the cooked shrimp with red chili powder, garam masala, and salt.
Heat the remaining 1 tbsp of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Place a samosa pastry in the pan and fill with the shrimp mixture.
Fold the pastry in a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Repeat with the remaining pastry and filling.
Fry the samosas until golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot with chutney and lemon wedges.
